title: Entadopsis stuhlmannii
taxonomy: Entadopsis stuhlmannii is classified under the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as legumes. Further, Entadopsis stuhlmannii falls under the subfamily Faboideae, which is a subcategory within the Fabaceae family. This species is also classified as a genus within the tribe Desmodieae.
